highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 4.147.0 ships 28 product-facing changes across bug fixes and platform work.

breaking.title: Public API surface changed
breaking.body: The linked API-diff report for 4.147.0 lists the removed and modified members. Review it before upgrading and update any call sites flagged there.

bullets.lead: SkiaSharp to Skia milestone 132
bullets.detail: Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale.

contributor_summaries.ramezgerges: SkiaSharp to Skia milestone 132; Rewrite Uno Platform sample as multi-page app; Move AI agent config to shared location for Claude Code and GitHub Copilot; skia to milestone 147; variable font support to SkiaSharp and HarfBuzzSharp; SkiaSharpGenerator to…
contributor_summaries.4Darmygeometry: Linux Bionic native assets support; PolySharp for C# 13 support on legacy TFMs
contributor_summaries.ebariche: Reduce SkiaFiddle WASM application size by ~60%
contributor_summaries.sasakrsmanovic: Uno Platform link and description n README.md
contributor_summaries.SimonvBez: SKGLView not rendering after tab switch in MAUI TabBar
